_purpose: Project-level ReviewFinding supersession ledger. Each entry overrides the inferred 'status' field on a ReviewFinding node when build_graph runs. Used to flip status='open' → 'fixed' for findings whose underlying issue has been remediated by a later wave, without editing the original review .md file (which is treated as immutable history).

_entry_format.finding_id: string — the canonical ReviewFinding node ID, format `review:{date}:{review_name}:{section_num}` (matches the ID minted by extract_review_finding_nodes)
_entry_format.status: string — the new status, one of 'fixed', 'accepted', 'reopened'
_entry_format.superseded_by: string|null — review_id of the re-review that confirmed the fix, OR a Wave close-doc path
_entry_format.evidence: string — short human-readable note on what / where / when
_entry_format.date: ISO-8601 date the supersession was applied

BLOCKER (FAIL Class IA + SD): paper-quoted threshold G > 0.01 at omega/kappa = 0.175 was wrong. Recompute: G(0.175k) = 1/(exp(2*pi*0.175)-1) = 1/(3-1) = 0.5, not 0.01. The G > 0.01 threshold is at omega/kappa ~ 0.734, not at the published 0.175 value. Single-shot 5-sigma photon count: N_probe = 25/G^2 = 100 at G=0.5 (matches abstract's 'SNR ~ 11 for N_probe ~ 100' since at peak G=1.14, SNR = sqrt(100)*1.14 = 11.4). At G=0.01, N_probe = 250000 — paper's '~10^4 probe photons' was wrong by factor 25. Drift propagated across 4 sites: E1 abstract + body §4 + figure 1 caption + figure 1 dashed-line position. Source: paper12_polariton (figure caption only — body text in source did not have the drift). Fix applied 2026-05-04: papers/E1/paper_draft.tex 3 text sites + src/core/visualizations.py fig_stimulated_hawking_spectrum threshold y=0.01->0.5 and annotation 10^4->100 + papers/paper12_polariton/paper_draft.tex caption corrected with [historical correction] inline note pointing to this ledger entry. Stage 10 round 2 verified GREEN with internal consistency (G=0.5 single-shot 5-sigma <-> N_probe=100 <-> SNR=11.4 at peak G=1.14 <-> threshold crossing at omega/kappa = ln(3)/(2*pi)). QI candidate raised: pre-Stage-9 arithmetic verification step in BUNDLE_LIFT_PROCEDURE.md §7 LaTeX-compile gate to verify all paper-quoted numerical thresholds by direct re-computation. The provenance discipline log: G > 0.5 at omega/kappa = ln(3)/(2*pi) ~ 0.175 is now the canonical version; G > 0.01 was the historic incorrect value.
